g.title: SEM5
g.text: SEM-5 · Seminoma — Post First-Line Chemotherapy Management (Stage IIA–III)

g.title: r_none
g.text: No residual mass, OR residual ≤3 cm

g.title: note
g.text: Rare nonseminomatous elements on resection: if non-teratomatous, manage as viable seminoma.
EP/TIP/VIP/VeIP regimens — see TEST-E/F. Consider referral to high-volume center.
